name: Indrani Inapakolla
title: Full Stack Engineer
bio: Full Stack Engineer with AI experience and 3+ years of experience building scalable web applications.
resume_text:
Software Engineer with 3 years across product and infrastructure, delivering scalable, high-performance systems and cloud applications. Skilled in React, Java Spring Boot and Python, Kafka & Azure data pipelines. Experienced in designing microservices, containerizing with Docker/Kubernetes, and automating CI/CD for speed and reliability.

Experience:
- Reacher Platforms (YC S25), Software Engineer, San Francisco, Jan 2026–present: Built full-stack creative agent feature (React.js, Python, GCP) processing TikTok API data; engineered end-to-end content moderation platform analyzing 170K videos weekly with Sentry observability.
- XNODE Inc, Founding Engineer, Remote, Jan 2025–Jan 2026: Built fullstack workflow system (TypeScript, FastAPI, SpringBoot) reducing PM manual effort by 80%; implemented LLM-powered RAG pipeline with Azure Blob & PG Vector; introduced OpenTelemetry reducing incident triage by 40%.
- Blue Cross Blue Shield (Florida Blue), Software Engineer, Florida, July 2024–Dec 2025: Designed Spring Boot & Apache Kafka service for real-time fraud detection cutting failure rate by 73%; automated PostgreSQL to AWS RDS migration lowering storage costs by 30%.
- Phenom, Software Engineer, Hyderabad, July 2021–Aug 2022: Shipped rule-based candidate profiling system improving assessment accuracy by 75%; built REST microservice reducing customer onboarding from 3 days to minutes.

Education: Arizona State University, M.S Computer Science, GPA 4.0, Aug 2022–May 2024.

Technical Skills: Java, Python, Go, JavaScript, SQL, TypeScript, React.js, Spring Boot, FastAPI, Node.js, GraphQL, Kafka, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, LangChain, VectorDB.

github_repos.name: real-time-risk-scorer
github_repos.description: Real-Time Transaction Risk Scorer flags or blocks risky financial transactions using rule-based logic and machine learning. Processes transactions in real time, enabling banks and payment providers to detect and prevent fraud instantly.

github_repos.name: vulnerability-scanner
github_repos.description: A Go-based vulnerability scanner service that processes security data from GitHub repos. Features: concurrent processing, SQLite storage, REST API, severity filtering. 85%+ test coverage.

github_repos.name: Student-Scores-Prediction-using-Linear-Regression
github_repos.description: This data set contains scores and number of hours each student studied.using supervised learning algorithm we need to predict the scores of the students based on the number of hours studied.I used linear regression to build this model.

github_repos.name: Decision-Tree-algorithm
